moments.quote: THANK YOU FOR JOINING US FOR THIS ANNUAL celebration of staff who have devoted over three decades of their lives to the public schools of Brookline and to our students.

I live for those hard-fought aha moments when a complex concept finally clicks and the sudden surge of confidence when students begin to recognize themselves as capable problem solvers.

summary: During the Brookline School Committee Meeting on June 18, 2026, a retirement celebration for several members of the school community, including Elizabeth Hendrickson, was acknowledged, with performance recognition and expressions of gratitude for their service, particularly regarding the METCO program [17:16][127:35]. The meeting also included discussions about future class sizes, equity in education, and plans for the upcoming school year, emphasizing the importance of maintaining support for low-income students and addressing disparities [119:15][148:01]. The committee highlighted the need for initiatives to enhance the educational experience and foster diversity in schools, with a focus on upcoming projects [198:01][259:23].
title: Brookline School Committee Meeting - June 18, 2026
